allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('e:/champs-layout/next-dev/probe-pairings.json'\); const phase2 = d.filter\(p => p.phase === 2\); console.log\('Phase 2 samples:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(phase2.slice\(0,2\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('e:/champs-layout/next-dev/probe-pairings.json'\); const phase2 = d.filter\(p => p.phase === 2\); console.log\('All phase 2 matches:'\); for\(const p of phase2\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const h=fs.readFileSync\('e:/champs-layout/next-dev/probe-pairings.html','utf8'\); const m=h.match\(/<div class=\\"bracket-match\\"[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?<\\/div>\\s*<\\/div>/g\); console.log\('matches:', m && m.length\); if\(m\) console.log\(m[0]\);")
